transport.environment_policy: native runtime allowlist; no provider API keys inherited

paraphrased_evidence.A: The block reframes reward as brief relief from a self-renewing cycle, then challenges learned preferences and presents change as restored choice, though sweeping claims may strain an intelligent reader's trust.
paraphrased_evidence.B: The block reframes reward as brief relief from a self-renewing cycle, then challenges learned preferences and presents change as restored choice, though sweeping claims may strain an intelligent reader's trust.

parsed.generic_mechanism: Belief changes when successive chapters explain how an apparent reward perpetuates its own need, reveal the conditioning supporting it, and recast stopping as recovery of autonomy.
